products.title: Samsung Galaxy M56 5G (8GB + 128GB, Light Green)
products.short_description: Samsung Galaxy M56 5G features a slim design, Exynos 1480 processor, AMOLED display, and 50MP AI camera for a balanced mid-range experience.
products.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy M56 5G is a stylish and performance-oriented mid-range smartphone featuring the Exynos 1480 processor, 8GB RAM, and 128GB storage. It comes with a slim 7.2mm design and Gorilla Glass Victus+ protection on both sides for durability. The Super AMOLED+ display offers vibrant visuals with high brightness, while the 50MP AI-powered camera delivers good photography performance. With a 5000mAh battery, vapour cooling system, and long-term software support, it is designed for smooth everyday usage and gaming.
pros: Good overall performance for daily use
Strong build quality with Gorilla Glass
cons: Charger not included in the box
Battery performance is average for heavy users
Camera not consistent in all conditions

positive: Good value for money in mid-range

offers: GST invoice available for business users

seo.meta_title: Samsung Galaxy M56 5G Price in India 2026 | Specs & Review
seo.meta_description: Buy Samsung Galaxy M56 5G with AMOLED display, 50MP camera, and Exynos processor. Check price, features, pros & cons.
